The '''Battle of Eidoloni''' was a conflict in the [[Eidoloni system/Legends|Eidoloni system]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] that took place in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

==Background==
Following the investigation of the [[Comm Center]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Communications relay/Legends|communications relay]] that was broadcasting Imperial secrets to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] through an old frequency that was not used for some time by [[Zaletta]], who was willing to defect from the Empire, the Alliance pinpointed the exact location of the defector who was located on a outpost called [[DX-11a]]. The Alliance decided to attack the outpost to draw the defector out of hiding and allow him to join without attracting suspicion. However, they believed that the probability of an Imperial response was high. What the Alliance never suspected was that [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Kupalo]] was actually a brain-washed spy for the Empire.

==Battle==
The [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Redemption/Legends|''Redemption'']] along with 4 [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] arrived at a location nearby the outpost. The 4 X-wings then approached the station and destroyed all the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. The two other ships, the [[container transport]] ''[[Freedon]]'' and the [[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|''Neutron Star''-class bulk cruiser]] ''[[Golga'tha]]'' also jumped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], rendering the base defenseless. After bringing down the shields, 4 [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] launched from the station. Red 2, piloted by [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]], inspected them and found the last one, ''[[AA-23]]'', to contain the defector. The Alliance then sent the shuttle coordinates to rendezvous with the Rebels. The shuttle received the coordinates and left to meet with the Redemption. While that was going on, the fighters finished of the station and returned to the frigate.

When Zaletta offered his defection and docked with the ''Redemption'', the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Subjugator (Imperial II-class)|''Subjugator'']] and the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Restrainer]]'' arrived in an attempt to trap and destroy the ''Redemption''. The [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] arrived, launching [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] in to help destroy the ''Restrainer'' and provide cover for the ''Redemption''. Despite the ''Subjugator''{{'s}} large amounts of TIE fighters, [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE interceptors]], [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bomber]] and [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]]. The ''Restrainer'' was destroyed, allowing both of the Alliance starships to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Aftermath==
Zaletta was placed in the ''Liberty''{{'s}} brig for suspected treachery until the Alliance would verify his claims of ignorance. Meanwhile Kupalo, knowing that soon Zaletta's claims would be verified, would soon attempt to steal the shuttle to try and make Zaletta's defection all for nothing.

==Behind the scenes==
Bonus objectives are to destroy the Space Station [[DX-11a]], all Imperial starfighters and the [[Subjugator (Imperial II-class)|''Subjugator'']]. It is not certain if all of these Bonus objectives are Canon.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
